roadmap.titleEn: Five phases complete. Public launch imminent.
roadmap.subEn: The full open-core engine - all five pillars, React UI, i18n, BYOK, SSRF guard - is written, tested and hardened. One outstanding item before v1.0: API auth middleware for public exposure.
roadmap.subFr: Le moteur open core complet - cinq piliers, UI React, i18n, BYOK, garde SSRF - est ecrit, teste et durci. Un seul point restant avant v1.0: middleware d'auth API pour exposition publique.

milestones.labelEn: Five pillars on-page - ASO static included, 4 export formats
milestones.labelFr: Cinq piliers on-page - ASO statique inclus, 4 formats d'export

milestones.labelEn: React UI, EN/FR, full BYOK, SSRF guard - 401 tests, 87% coverage
milestones.labelFr: UI React, EN/FR, BYOK complet, garde SSRF - 401 tests, 87 % couverture

milestones.labelEn: Public OSS release - API auth + git history cleanup
milestones.labelFr: Publication OSS publique - auth API + nettoyage historique git

milestones.labelEn: Operated offering - monitoring, history, multi-user, white-label
milestones.labelFr: Offre operee - monitoring, historisation, multi-user, marque blanche
